Features

Everything you need to manage
direct bookings professionally

Built for owners with 1-5 properties who want a professional booking experience without the complexity (or expense) of a full Property Management System.

Booking Management

Create bookings, add guest details, set payment schedules, and manage everything easily from one simple dashboard.

Modern Payment Methods

Accept cards, bank transfers, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. Automatic payment reminders chase guests so you don't have to.

Secure Guest Portal

Guests see their booking details, payment schedules, and a pay button. No app to download, no account creation, no hassle.

Automated Emails

Professional booking confirmations, payment reminders, and receipts sent automatically. Guests stay informed, you stay hands-off.

Manual Payment Options

Handle payments manually, record bank transfer, cash, and telephone card payments quickly and easily.

Full Transparency

Every receipt shows a full breakdown — transaction fees, platform fees, net amount. No hidden charges, no surprises. Ever.

How it works

Up and running in minutes

No complex setup. No training required. If you can send an email, you can use Owners HQ.

1

Create a booking

Add your guest's details, property, dates, and fees. Set a payment schedule with deposit and balance due dates. Your guest receives a professional confirmation email instantly.

2

Guests pay securely

Your guest visits their personal booking page — no app, no account needed. They see the full breakdown and pay by whichever payment methods you've enabled.

3

Get paid, stay informed

Payments go directly to your account, not ours, as soon as you are paid. Both you and your guest get detailed receipts. Your dashboard tracks everything in real time.

Pricing

Pay only when you earn

No monthly subscriptions. No per-property fees. No feature tiers. You pay a small fee per booking — that's it.

Launch pricing — locked in for early adopters
1%

of booking value

Minimum fee £10 per booking
Maximum fee £25 per booking
Monthly subscription Free — always
Guest fees Zero
Feature access Everything, always
Start Free

Stripe processing fees apply separately

Example: On a £2,000 booking, your platform fee is £20 (1%). On Airbnb, your combined host and guest fees would be £300+. You save £280.

Why Owners HQ

Built different, on purpose

Not a PMS

No bloated software

Many PMS platforms charge £15–£100 per month and have hundreds of features you'll never use. Owners HQ gives you what you actually need — booking management and payments.

Not an OTA

No guest commissions

OTAs can charge guests 6–20% on top of your price. With Owners HQ, guests pay exactly what you quote. Zero booking fees for guests, ever.

Just right

Outcome-based, always

You only pay when bookings are processed. No bookings in January? You pay nothing. Every feature included for every user — no tiers, no paywalls, no lock-in.

I was spending hours chasing bank transfers and sending invoices by hand. Now my guests get a proper booking page and I get paid on time.
SC

Sarah Collins

Villa owner, Algarve · 2 properties

Ready to manage bookings
like a professional?

Get started today. Lock in 1% launch pricing forever. No credit card required.
